title: 10 Years in Canada: What I Know Now That I Didn't Then
excerpt: A decade ago I landed in Canada because a friend was applying and I thought, he's doing it, I'll do it too. Here's what ten years of building a life from scratch actually taught me.

title: What Your Portfolio Actually Needs (And What's Just Noise)
excerpt: Most student portfolios look the same: a to-do list app, a weather app, and a generic about page. Here's how to build one that actually gets you interviews.

title: From International Student to Tech Job in Canada: What Actually Works
excerpt: The honest, unfiltered story of navigating co-ops, networking, and the Canadian job market as an international student: what helped, what didn't, and what I wish I knew.
